sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (mjd Int64, date_value Nullable(String));
SELECT mjd, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(mjd) AS date_value FROM test_dates WHERE mjd > 58848;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(mjd) WHERE date_value IS NULL;
SELECT mjd, date_value FROM test_dates WHERE date_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mjd DESC;
